name: Sprint 5

dates.duration_note: 2026-06-10, single day. Final: 9 shipped / 0 in_progress / 0 not_shipped; all 9 companion issues closed_in_sprint 5. Shipped: viewer-server grill (ADR-0007, PRD-008), EXEC-054 auto-run viewer server, EXEC-052/053 verdict-ledger alignment, EXEC-057 prior-art digest persistence, EXEC-059/060 model tiers + Teammate colors, EXEC-061 viewer relocated into .excn/viewer (ADR-0002 ruling), EXEC-063 hook invocation logging + CODE_STANDARDS rule, EXEC-064 spawn guard (fired live on first opportunity). package-qa stale-rubric FAIL superseded after the def corrected to ADR-0005. Retro Loop landed two edits (builder/viewer pre-handoff literal self-check; PROCESS rubric-sweep-on-ADR-change), one revise cycle, alignment PASS; drafted by the Team Lead — no persistent scribe teammate existed this session and the spawn guard blocks one-shot scribe spawns; clerk executed the mechanical closes. Fresh-session grill pin carried a fourth time, undecided. process-adherence PASS at close.

goal: Grill and start the viewer-server track, settle the gate-verdict location, and let the prior-art agent persist its own digests.

shipped.title: Grill→PRD: viewer-server track (auto-run server, global-package discovery, viewer read-write)
shipped.summary: Viewer-server grill ran: ADR-0007 (one global server, repo registry, writes through the server) + PRD-008 published; EXEC-054 criteria extended, EXEC-055/056 criteria set in backlog. alignment PASS on the ADR.
shipped.notes: HITL, grill-first; sets EXEC-055/056 criteria; EXEC-054 implementation follows the PRD.

shipped.title: EXEC-054: session-start auto-run viewer server (validate on the dogfood Instance)
shipped.summary: viewer_server hook feature: SessionStart hash-port auto-run, zero-dep GET-only whitelisted daemon with idle self-exit, discovery record, doctor liveness; off in template, on here. package-qa PASS incl. live smoke; code-standards PASS (two revise cycles: named constants x5, truthful comment x1).
shipped.notes: AFK after the grill resolves the mechanism.

shipped.title: EXEC-052+053: settle where gate verdicts live; align gate-watch sensing + sprint schema
shipped.summary: EXEC-052: hooks.config.json variant-classed in stamp-policy.js; flipped toggles no longer drift-reported; stale marker hash drops on next update. EXEC-053: optional step_log added to sprint.schema.json (template + root); sprint_4/5 validate strictly; gate-watch verdict sensing extended. Gates PASS (one revise cycle: named patterns).
shipped.notes: AFK; one decision drives both; schema change is Src-First.

shipped.title: prior-art agent writes its digest to .excn/research/
shipped.summary: prior-art agent writes its digest to .excn/research/prior-art-<prd-id>.md; alignment PASS, Brooks approved.
shipped.notes: HITL: chartered def change, alignment-gated, Brooks approval.

shipped.title: Invoked Agents on lighter models
shipped.summary: model: sonnet on alignment/process-adherence/nothing-new (template+root) and code-standards/package-qa (root); clerk stays haiku; Teammates unpinned. alignment PASS, Brooks approved.

shipped.title: Teammate colors
shipped.summary: color frontmatter on all five persistent Teammates (scribe blue templated) + _teammate.template.md color line. alignment PASS, Brooks approved.

shipped.title: Ship viewer/ in the Template so the stamped viewer-server has a page to serve
shipped.summary: viewer promoted into the Template at .excn/viewer/ per ADR-0002 ruling (root mirrored via git mv); daemon whitelist + index mapping repointed; root-absolute asset refs fix a pre-existing 404 at bare /; whitelist gains the issues/sprints JSON the board fetches. code-standards PASS, package-qa PASS.

shipped.title: hook invocation logging (architect authors the standard rule within this slice)
shipped.summary: CODE_STANDARDS ## Hooks invocation-logging rule (alignment PASS) + hook-lib logInvocation (self-catching, rolling 5000) + every wired hook logs each exit path + doctor heartbeats read the unified hook-invocations_progress.json. code-standards PASS first-run, package-qa PASS.

shipped.title: PreToolUse spawn guard: rostered persistent Teammates must not be spawned as one-shot background agents
shipped.summary: spawn-guard PreToolUse hook denies one-shot spawns of configured persistent-Teammate types citing the TEAM_DIRECTIVE routing rule; per-Instance type list in variant hooks.config.json; off in template, on here. Gates PASS.

decisions.title: Viewer-server grill resolved (ADR-0007, PRD-008)
decisions.summary: Idle self-exit + idempotent start; hash-derived per-repo ports in a quiet range with a *_progress discovery record; viewer_server toggle off-in-template/on-here; one global server with repo registry at step 2; viewer writes validate + land via the server as scribe's instrument. EXEC-055/056 stay in backlog with criteria set; sprint 5 implements EXEC-054 only.

decisions.title: package-qa rubric corrected to ADR-0005
decisions.summary: The final combined package-qa FAILed on a stale rubric bullet still requiring the pre-ADR-0005 gitignore set; the definition was corrected to the ratified contract (alignment PASS) and the gate re-judged PASS. Adherence rubrics now have a known staleness failure mode when ADRs change contracts they encode.

retrospective_notes.title: Grill ran context-loaded (third occurrence)
retrospective_notes.body: The sprint-5 viewer-server grill ran in the working session; PROCESS pins Work Grills to a fresh session. Third consecutive caveat-accepted occurrence (sprints 3, 4, 5). The pin is either getting teeth or getting rewritten — carried again for the Retro Loop.

retrospective_notes.title: Named-constants is the only violation builders hit — three times running
retrospective_notes.body: Every code-standards FAIL across sprints 4–5 (builder twice, viewer once, builder again) is the same Structure rule: a meaningful literal inline where the file already names equivalents. Candidate: one sentence in builder/viewer defs or the CODE_STANDARDS rule itself calling out the self-check before handoff ("grep your diff for digit literals and string suffixes in logic").

retrospective_notes.title: Adherence rubrics can go stale against ratified ADRs
retrospective_notes.body: package-qa's definition encoded the old gitignore contract and correctly FAILed current code against it — a false positive from rubric staleness, not gate malfunction. Candidate: when an ADR changes a contract, the closing checklist includes sweeping Adherence Agent definitions that encode it.

retrospective_notes.title: Retro Loop drafted by the Team Lead, not scribe
retrospective_notes.body: No persistent scribe teammate existed this session; the spawn guard (EXEC-064) correctly blocked one-shot scribe spawns, so the Team Lead drafted the close edits with per-edit alignment gates and clerk executed the mechanical record changes. Standing question for next sprint open: spawn the rostered Teammates as actual persistent teammates at sprint start so scribe owns its loop.

step_log.summary: PASS, 0 violations — chartered EXEC-057 change (digest persists to .excn/research/prior-art-<prd-id>.md) conforms to Principles and Philosophy; namespaced file coexists with architect's research ownership.

PASS, 0 violations - ADR-0007 records the sprint-5 grill decisions (idle self-exit, hash-derived port + discovery record, off-in-template default, one global server with repo registry, server validates+writes as scribe's instrument); meets all three ADR offer criteria, Precise Minimalism holds, no next-steps beyond the decided path, consistent with ADR-0002/0005/0006.

FAIL — 1 violation: Named constants in src/template/.claude/hooks/gate-watch.js verdictEvidenceSince (inline /^sprint_\d+\.json$/ and '_progress.json' literals duplicate SPRINT_FILE_PATTERN/PROGRESS_FILE_PATTERN semantics). All other rules hold; mirrors byte-identical; fail-safe exit-0 sanctioned by ADR-0006.
PASS, 0 violations — verdictEvidenceSince now tests reconstructed root-relative paths against SPRINT_FILE_PATTERN/PROGRESS_FILE_PATTERN
FAIL — 5 named-constants violations (bare 200 in viewer-server.js and cli.js, djb2 literals 5381/33, text/plain mime, {url} placeholder string)

FAIL — 1 violation. All 5 prior named-constants violations resolved (DJB2_SEED/DJB2_MULTIPLIER, shared HTTP_OK, ERROR_CONTENT_TYPE, CONTEXT_URL_PLACEHOLDER, VIEWER_HEALTH_OK_STATUS); mirrors byte-identical. New: Truthful comments — viewer-server-rules.js documents ERROR_CONTENT_TYPE as 'the daemon's plain-text error bodies (404/405)' but viewer-server-daemon.js sets it only on the 404 response; the 405 response sets no Content-Type.

Manifest parity (43 stamped incl. 3 new viewer hooks, dotted .gitignore, marker, pointers), idempotent re-init, JSON parse, npm pack parity exact, viewer-server_progress.json ignored / marker not / root .gitignore untouched, skip-safety + --force host-byte preservation, all 4 hooks fail-safe on garbage+empty stdin, update idempotent with drift persisted, variant untouched, flipped hooks.config.json toggles not drift-reported and stale marker hash dropped (EXEC-052 fix), doctor healthy/broken-config/outdated/unstamped + viewer disabled state, live viewer smoke (health 200, whitelist 404, traversal 404, idempotent pid reuse, record written, daemon killed clean), sprint_4+sprint_5 strictly valid against new schema.

PASS, 0 violations: 405 writeHead now includes ERROR_CONTENT_TYPE so the rules.js line 73 comment is truthful; mirror byte-identical; no new violations in file scan.

PASS, 0 violations — all three bullets are mechanically checkable: append-on-every-path (readable from hook source), helper-only writes (greppable), helper self-catches (inspectable). Standards Encode Only Checkable Rules holds. Tied to chartered EXEC-063 retro observation.

PASS, 0 violations. Viewer promoted to Template under .excn/viewer/ per ADR-0002; EXCN_ROOT/asset refs root-absolute (fixes bare-/ 404); whitelist widened with .excn/sprints/*.json and .excn/issues/*.json single-level patterns; INDEX_RELATIVE_PATH constant added. All Structure, Commenting rules hold; viewer-server-rules.js is a data module (not a wired hook), Hooks invocation-logging rule does not apply. Mirrors byte-identical.

PASS, 0 violations. hook-lib logInvocation helper (self-catching, rolling 5000-cap, OUTCOME_* constants) + all 5 wired scripts log exactly one record per exit path via helper only (disabled/noop/error/ok paths all covered). spawn-guard + spawn-guard-rules.js (EXEC-064): named constants, deep module, data/logic split. cli.js + health-policy.js HOOK_FEATURES + INVOCATION_LOG_PATH additions. All Structure, Commenting, CLI, and Hooks rules hold.

PASS, 0 violations — Gitignore bullet updated from pre-ADR-0005 set (sprints/, issues/, prds/, retros/, *_progress.json) to ADR-0005 contract (exactly *_progress.json); factual-staleness correction tied to the real package_qa_fail observation; root-only def, one bullet changed, no cognition coaching, single responsibility intact.

PASS, 0 violations. Teardown language conforms.
